song.title: O Bread to Pigrims Given
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O Bread to pilgrims given, O Food for saints to eat, O Manna sent from heaven, For heav’n-born natures meet;|| Give us, for Thee long pining, To eat till richly filled; Till, earth’s delights resigning, Our every wish is stilled.
[V2] 2) O Water, life bestowing, Forth from the Savior’s heart, A fountain purely flowing, A fount of love Thou art.|| Oh, let us, freely tasting, Our burning thirst assuage; Thy sweetness, never wasting, Avails from age to age.
[V3] 3) Jesus, this feast receiving, We Thee unseen adore; Thy faithful word believing, We take, and doubt no more.|| Give us, Thou true and loving, On earth to live in Thee; Then, death the veil removing, Thy glorious face to see.
song.author: Maintzich Gesangbuch
